subject: An athletic warrior in workout-style gear, sleeveless top, headband and ponytail, mid-stride with a glowing energy weapon raised overhead, shouting to draw the attention of an off-canvas threat away from a pale lumpen humanoid figure to their left
description: A figure in athletic workout attire — sleeveless top, shorts over leggings, sneakers, sweatband and ponytail — lunges forward in a dynamic action pose inside a ruined gothic interior. They wield a sword or long blade that crackles with bright magenta-pink energy, the weapon trailing electric arcs. Their mouth is open in a shout, head turned to call out toward an unseen pursuer off-frame. To the left of the scene stands a pale, eyeless, vaguely-humanoid blob-creature with a dark mouth, partly slumped, the thing being protected by the distraction. The background is a stained-glass window in disrepair, broken arches, and pulsing red-violet light. Palette is dominated by hot magenta, deep purple, crimson and rim-lit pinks against cooler shadow tones — the signature Duskmourn horror-trapped-in-a-haunted-house look.
foreground: athletic warrior mid-lunge with glowing energy weapon, shouting; pale humanoid blob-creature partly visible at left
background: ruined gothic interior with broken stained-glass window, crumbling arches, electric arcs in the air
emotion: yelling, alert, focused — taunting/baiting a threat
